name: PhotoStore - AI Images & Gallery
description: Create AI images, explore beautiful photos, save favorites, and share with friends. Works offline!

screenshots.src: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 1280 720'%3E%3Crect width='1280' height='720' fill='%23f5f5f5'/%3E%3Ctext x='640' y='360' text-anchor='middle' fill='%2305a081' font-size='48' font-weight='bold'%3EPhotoStore Gallery%3C/text%3E%3Ctext x='640' y='420' text-anchor='middle' fill='%23666' font-size='24'%3EBrowse, create, and save AI images%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E
screenshots.label: PhotoStore gallery view showing beautiful AI-generated images
